seoTitle: Singapore Commuter Housing Report | Johor Research
seoDescription: Analysis for Singapore-based tenants and investors targeting JB commuter stock — R&F Princess Cove, Medini and selected Mount Austin blocks.
title: Singapore Commuter Housing Report
subtitle: CIQ, RTS & Iskandar cross-border rental
intro: Analysis for Singapore-based tenants and investors targeting JB commuter stock — R&F Princess Cove, Medini and selected Mount Austin blocks.

sections.title: Commuter corridors
paragraphs: R&F Princess Cove: highest CIQ footfall, RM 2,200–4,500 rent band.
Medini: lower entry, Legoland / Tuas narrative, RM 1,600–3,000.
Weekend and flex-work patterns post-2024 border normalization.

sections.title: Pricing drivers
paragraphs: Car park and management responsiveness are top tenant filters.
SGD–MYR spread supports yield arbitrage for investors.

sections.title: Risks
paragraphs: Border policy and queue times affect tenant retention.
Oversupply in new Medini phases — price to recent transactions.
